title: clematis dolichopoda
intro: Clematis dolichopoda, also known as the "sweet autumn clematis," is a species of flowering plant in the clematis genus, native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of clematis dolichopoda include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of clematis dolichopoda often involve infusions or decoctions of the root or stem, which are used to treat various health conditions.
